About

Where vision meets style

I'm Divya Kulkarni — a fashion stylist, personal wardrobe consultant, and founder of my own rental clothing venture. Based between Pune and Dubai, I bring a global perspective to every project I touch.

My work spans editorial shoots, brand campaigns, film & television, bridal styling, and personal wardrobing. From the Middle East Fashion Week to Marathi cinema, I've shaped looks that are remembered.

I believe styling is more than clothes — it's identity, confidence, and storytelling. Whether you're a brand, a model, or an individual, I'll help you look and feel like yourself, only sharper.

Fashion Stylist · Personal Styling Consultant · Wardrobe Designer · Founder, Rental Clothing Venture · Emerging Fashion Entrepreneur

What I Offer

Services & Expertise

01

Personal Styling

One-on-one consultations tailored to your lifestyle, body type, and fashion preferences. Wardrobe audits, capsule wardrobes, and occasion-specific styling solutions.

02

Editorial & Campaign

Full styling for brand shoots, commercial campaigns, and editorial features. Jewellery, clothing, accessories, and footwear — from concept to camera.

03

Rental Clothing

Founder of a curated occasion wear rental venture — access high-fashion looks for events, shoots, and weddings without the full retail price.

04

Image Consulting

Personal branding through fashion. I help professionals, entrepreneurs, and public figures build a visual identity that commands presence.

05

Film & Television

Costume styling for productions — from Marathi short films to celebrity appearances. Full wardrobe management from sourcing to final look.

06

Brand Development

Fashion brand consulting — trend research, collection ideation, design identity, and market positioning for emerging labels and entrepreneurs.
